ok.description: True iff the tool completed without error. False indicates a recoverable failure surfaced in `data.error`.

data.description: Tool-specific payload. Column extensions (audit_trail, provenance, gate_state) live as keys inside this object. Per-tool JSON Schemas MAY further constrain this via $ref.

warnings.description: Human-readable warnings that did NOT block the operation. Used by context hooks to surface non-fatal issues.

next_suggested_tools.description: Tool names (MCP form: `mcp__<row>_<verb>`) the caller might invoke next. Used by the routing skill for what-next queries.
